title: potentilla nivea f. major
intro: Potentilla nivea f. major, also known as the White Cinquefoil or Silver-leaved Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Potentilla nivea f. major lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain tannins, flavonoids, and glycosides with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Potentilla nivea f. major include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used internally to support overall health and well-being.
